links.targetTitle: Chat 1-to-1 PSS messaging with feed-indexed history shipped

global.title: Document share in chat reaches parity with Settings-share
global.content:
## What shipped

Chat can now share documents with the same fidelity as the Settings-level share flow.

- **Document-share attachment type** - `DocumentShareAttachment` plus `DocumentShareCard` rendering.
- **Adapter method** - `shareDocumentInChat` builds the bundle via the unified `buildDriveShareBundle`, performs the ACT upload and delivers via PSS.
- **Composer share-document button + picker modal** - `document-share-picker.tsx` provides a drive selector, multi-select of documents, and a caption.
- **Parity with Settings-share** - same bundle shape, full op history (including unflushed ops), original signer preserved.

## Why it matters

Sharing in chat no longer loses authorship or history relative to the Settings share path, so chat is now a legitimate distribution surface for collaborative documents rather than a lossy broadcast channel.
global.description: Composer share-document button and picker modal deliver document shares through chat with full op history and original signer preserved, matching Settings-share.
